<svg width="400" height="400" viewBox="0 0 400 400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

    <circle cx="0" cy="-50" r="20" fill="url(#petalGradient)" transform="rotate(60)"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="-50" r="20" fill="url(#petalGradient)" transform="rotate(120)"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="-50" r="20" fill="url(#petalGradient)" transform="rotate(180)"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="-50" r="20" fill="url(#petalGradient)" transform="rotate(240)"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="-50" r="20" fill="url(#petalGradient)" transform="rotate(300)"/>

    <!-- Stem -->
    <rect x="-10" y="150" width="20" height="50" fill="#009900"/>

    <radialGradient id="petalGradient">

      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#FFF"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>
</svg>
